title: Seed Registry, Origin Scope, Budgets, and Stop Policy · Type Recall
summary: A delayed incident review reconstructs seed registry, origin scope, budgets, and stop policy from revision, authorization, seed, URL, policy, response bytes, parsed identity, record provenance, frontier transition, Promise settlement, browser state, report row, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for deny-by-default crawl-scope policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, caus…
objectives: Bind each seed to owner authorization, purpose, expected content class, policy version, contact, and expiry.
Define allowed schemes, hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and cross-origin resources with deny-by-default admission.
Specify methods, path prefixes, query keys and values, fragments, pagination, downloads, forms, and content types as testable rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Contact
steps.instruction:
review case — A review TypeScript team handles case 8248 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to admit authorized seeds through origin, path, query, multiresource budget, stop, and contact policy; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then change one HTML repair, Cheerio mode, selector, unknown value, record schema, link relation, or metadata case and retain rejected evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Implement automatic stop triggers, owner pause, kill path, partial-output policy, cleanup, incident contact, and restart authorization.

Inspect the Stop Contact trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Stop Contact.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for implement automatic stop triggers, owner pause, kill path, partial-output policy, cleanup, incident contact, and restart authorization.
